titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Yale Law School Faculty, Governing Board, and Board of Permanent Officers Meeting Minutes
Yale Law School Faculty, Governing Board, and Board of Permanent Officers Meeting Minutes
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Friday July 29, 2022 at 10:43

did.unittitle: Yale Law School, faculty, governing board, and board of permanent officers meeting minutes
did.abstract: The materials consist of minutes of meetings documenting the activities and operations of the Yale Law School faculty, governing board, and Board of Permanent Officers.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 26-C (YRG 26-C), Records of officers and faculty of the Yale Law School. The original minutes for 1950-1981 on reels 3 and 4 are held by the Yale Law School.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: While this collection as a whole is available for research, parts of it may be restricted due to law, university policy or fragility. Any restricted material will be noted as such.
The entire collection has been microfilmed. Patrons must use HM 130 instead of the originals.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Yale Law School Faculty, Governing Board and Board of Permanent Officers Meeting Minutes (RU 450). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The materials consist of minutes of meetings documenting the activities and operations of the Yale Law School faculty, governing board, and Board of Permanent Officers.

did.unittitle: Minutes of the faculty, governing board, and Board of Permanent Officers

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Reel 1 and reel 2 open for research; reel 3 is restricted until January 1, 2057.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: These records are restricted until January 1, 2057.
